calendar.matters:
Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon , CSR#6840.

Oren P. Noah, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs PHILIP GILBERT and PATRICIA GILBERT("plaintiffs").
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs PHILIP GILBERT and PATRICIA GILBERT("plaintiffs").shall recover damages from defendant MARINE ENGINEERING AND SUPPLY COMPANY in the following amounts: As to Plaintiff PHILIP GILBERT, $939,950.00 in Economic Damages, $2,000,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, as to Plaintiff PATRICIA GILBERT, $500,000.00 in Non-Econonic Damages, for a combined total amount of $3,439,950.00.
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Oreh Noah, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Philip Gilbert.
Plaintiff's application for Default Judgment against Defendant Marine Engineering and Supply Company is heard this day.
The request for several Default Judgment is denied without prejudice and the court defers it to be heard at a later time by the Trial Court Judge at the time of Trial of this case.

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Continued To May-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
